name: manufacturing-os-root
description: Root orchestration for the dual-backend ManufacturingOS stack (Django platform + NestJS domain + Next.js frontend).

scripts.dev:domain: cd b3-erp/backend && npx prisma generate && npm run start:dev
scripts.build: npm run build:domain && npm run build:web
scripts.install:all: npm install && (cd b3-erp/backend && npm install) && (cd b3-erp/frontend && npm install)
